---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working? Let us know — no technical experience needed!
title: "🐛 "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 What happened?

_Describe what went wrong. Plain English is perfect — no jargon needed!_

## 🎯 What did you expect to happen?

_What were you hoping would happen instead?_

## 📋 Steps to reproduce

_Help us see the same thing you saw:_

1. I opened my terminal and ran `sidecar`
2. Then I...
3. And then...

## 🖥️ Your setup

| Detail | Your answer |
|--------|-------------|
| **Operating system** | macOS / Linux / WSL |
| **How you installed** | `curl \| bash` installer / manual copy |
| **Sidecar version** | _(type `sidecar --help` to see it)_ |
| **Using tmux?** | Yes / No (solo mode) |

## 📸 Screenshots

_If you can, paste a screenshot of what you see. This helps a lot!_

## 💬 Anything else?

_Any other context that might help us figure this out._

---

> 🙏 **Thank you for reporting this!** Every bug report makes Sidecar better for everyone.
> Don't worry about being "technical enough" — if something confused you, that's a bug we want to fix.
